steps.expected: Test passes — results sorted by descending cosine similarity with 'score' key
steps.observed: PASSED. Test creates 3 facts with known embeddings, queries search_facts_semantic, verifies results sorted by descending score and all have float 'score' key.

steps.expected: Function accepts query_vec, returns dicts with score key
steps.observed: Function signature: search_facts_semantic(conn, query_vec, category=None, project=None, limit=10) -> list[dict]

steps.expected: Test passes — 768-dim embeddings skipped when querying with 384-dim vector
steps.observed: PASSED. Test inserts 384-dim and 768-dim embeddings, queries with 384-dim vector. 768-dim fact excluded from results, no crash.

assertions.title: search_facts_semantic filters by category and project

steps.observed: PASSED. Inserts facts with categories 'preference' and 'tool', filters by category='preference', all results have category='preference'.

steps.expected: Only facts matching project filter returned
steps.observed: PASSED. Inserts facts with different projects, filters by project='proj1', all results contain 'proj1' in project field.

steps.expected: Facts with similarity <= 0.3 excluded from results
steps.observed: PASSED. Test creates high-similarity and low-similarity (nearly orthogonal) embeddings. All returned results have score > 0.3, and the low-similarity fact ID is excluded.

steps.observed: PASSED. memory_search_facts_semantic importable from src.mcp_server with correct signature and limit default=10.

steps.expected: Returns formatted string with IDs, categories, confidence, similarity scores
steps.observed: PASSED. Output contains 'Semantic fact matches', '#1', 'tool', and 'sim=0.850'.

steps.observed: PASSED. Returns 'No semantic fact matches' for nonexistent query.

assertions.title: /api/search returns semantic_facts key

steps.expected: All unit tests pass verifying semantic_facts key in API response
steps.observed: All 5 tests PASSED: type=all includes semantic_facts array, FTS-only returns empty semantic_facts, empty query returns semantic_facts, populated results structure correct, field validation passes.

Live server response does NOT include 'semantic_facts' key (keys: messages, facts, sessions, semantic, timing_ms, query). However, code inspection of web.py confirms 'semantic_facts' is present in the response dict at line 251. The live server has not been restarted with the latest code (per AGENTS.md: 'Do NOT restart or modify the web UI on port 8585').

steps.action: Inspect src/web.py for semantic_facts in search endpoint
steps.expected: semantic_facts key present in response dict
steps.observed: Confirmed: web.py lines 157, 222, 230, 251 all reference semantic_facts. The search endpoint builds semantic_facts list from search_facts_semantic() results and includes it in the response.

evidence.network: GET /api/search?q=test&type=all -> 200 (live server missing semantic_facts key due to stale process; code and unit tests confirm correct implementation)

assertions.issues: Live web server at port 8585 is running an older version without the semantic_facts changes. Unit tests confirm the code implementation is correct. Server restart is prohibited by AGENTS.md.

steps.expected: Semantic Fact Matches section with cards rendering similarity scores and click-to-inspect
steps.observed: Confirmed: Lines 565-605 contain a 'Semantic Fact Matches' section. Code renders cards with: data-fact-id attribute (click-to-inspect via result-fact class), badge with #ID, badge with category, badge with 'sim ' + score.toFixed(3), fact text, and optional compressed_details.
All 4 tests PASSED: 'Semantic Fact Matches' heading present, 'sim ' score badge rendered, data-fact-id for click-to-inspect present, semantic_facts referenced in app.js.

evidence.codeInspection: static/app.js lines 565-605 contain complete semantic fact card rendering with similarity scores and click-to-inspect behavior

frictions.description: Live web server at port 8585 is running an older version that does not include the semantic_facts key in /api/search responses. AGENTS.md prohibits restarting the service. Unit tests and code inspection confirm the implementation is correct.
frictions.resolution: Relied on unit tests (which test the actual code) and code inspection as primary evidence. Noted live server discrepancy as expected due to stale process.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. 19 pytest tests covering search_facts_semantic (7 tests), MCP tool (3 tests), web API (5 tests), and frontend rendering (4 tests) all pass. Code inspection confirmed correct implementation in memory_db.py, mcp_server.py, web.py, and app.js. Live server at port 8585 runs an older version without semantic_facts key, but code and unit tests confirm correct implementation.
